arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid open talks with leading Premier League defender
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid should be set for another busy summer transfer window in 2025, as they to close the gap to Barcelona and Real Madrid next season. Diego Simeone is keen for a new high-quality defender to be added to his squad, and at this stage, their leading target is a player that is tailor-made for […] The post Atletico Madrid open talks with leading Premier League defender appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Diego Simeone commends Atlético effort despite failure to register a shot on target amid cup exit
arts.sum: Atlético Madrid coach Diego Simeone spoke to the media before the La Liga clash with Sevilla on Sunday as the team looks to bounce back from the season effectively being ended with Copa del Rey elimination against FC Barcelona in midweek. A philosophical Simeone was asked about how the club can build on this season, explaining that, “since I arrived at Atlético a long time ago, I have always looked for pure growth.

arts.ttl: Preview: Sevilla vs. Atletico Madrid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's La Liga clash between Sevilla and Atletico Madrid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
